sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Kazahi, a lui tangthu, vanpan honpa hong paina thu,
Kalvari ah sihna hong thuak hi, misia kei hong gum hi,
A si hong luankhiat man a, gim in a tauna thu ka za,
Ka mawhnate ka ki sik a, tu’n zawhna , ka ngah hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Zawhna om hi, atawntung, ka honpa Zeisu sung,
A si tawh kei mi mawh, Hong zongin hong lei zo,
Ka theih ma’n hong it zo a, kei zong ka it kik thei ta,
Gualzawhna ka ngah nangin, A si sung hong phum zo

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: A damsak theih thu ka za, Ama vangliatna lang sak a,
Khebaite hoihtak lam pai sak hi,
Mittaw khuamu sak hi Tua ciang ka it Zeisu kiang,
kei hong dam sakin ka cih ciang,
Amah ka kiangah hong pai a, Zawhna a hong pia hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Van ainn nuam thu ka za,Topa’n kei ading bawlzo ta,
A hong tatkhiatna thu ka za
Khatvei ciang ke’n zong tua laiah,
